raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo wiꞥſch irr to Laukâ
atraddis/ ta faderreta Meita
brehze/ bet tur ne bija ne weens/
kas winnu ispeſtitu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad kas weennu jaunu
Meitu atrafs/kas ne irr faderreta/
un winnu ſagrahbs / un gullehs
pee winnas / un tee tohp atrasti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad buhs tami / kas pee
winnas gullejs/ tam Meitas
Tehwam peezdesmits ſudraba
Sihketus doht/ un ta lat wiꞥ-
nam par Seewu irr/ tapehz/ ka
wiꞥſch to irr apſmehjis / tas ne
warr winnu fatwu Muhschu at-
laift.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne weenam buhs fatwa
Tehwa Seewu nemt/nedsfawa
Tehwa uſſeggu atſegt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta XXIII. Nodalla.
Ram eekſch Deewa Draudses janahk/ un kam
nema: 1/3/7. No Neſchtihſtibas Lehgeri:
9/12. Mauzibu un Pagaidus ne buhs dſiht:
17/18/19. Ta Tuwaka Wihna.Dahrsu un
Druweß ne buhs aplaupiht: 24/25.
E weens/ kam tas Kau-
nums ſagrubsts/ jeb kas
Pee rahmihts irr/ laid eekſch
KUNGA Draudses nahk.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ne weenam Mankas-
fehrnam buhs eekſch ta KUN-
A Draudses * nahkt/ neds ar-
winna dejunts Augunam
hs eekſch ta KUNGA Dran-
es nahkt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "* Tasirr: Tahdam ne buhs ne kahdu Bazni-
-Amaru doht.
Ne weenam Ammonite-
n neds Moabiteram buhs
ſch ta KUNGA Draudses
hft/ ir lihds winnu defimits
gera.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Augumatt teem ne buhs eekſch ta
KUNGA Draudses nahkt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht ka tee jums ne irr
pretti nahkuſchi ar Maisi un ar
Uhdenu/ us to Zelfu / kad juhs
iſgalhjat no Egiptes-Geinnes /
un ka wiꞥſch pretti tew irr der-
rejs Bileamu Beora Dehln no
Petoras/ no Mesopotamijas/ ka
wiꞥſch tew nolahdetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas KUNGS taws
Deews ne gribbeja Bileamn pa-
klaufiht/ bet tas KUNGS taws
Deews irr tew to Lahstu par
Swehtumu pahrwehrtig / ta-
deht/ ka tas KUNGS taws
Deews tew inihleja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tadeht tew ne buhs wiꞥ-
no Meeru/ neds winxo Labbu-
mu mekleht/ wiſſas taiwas Dee-
nas muhscham.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "To Eedomiteri tew ne buhs
par negantu turreht / jo tas irr
taws Brahlis/ to Egipteri tew
ne buhs par negantu turreht/ jo
tu eſſi weens Swechineeks bijis
winna Semine.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Teem Behrneem/ kaswin-
nam taps dsimmuschi eekſch tre-
scha Auguma / teem buhs eekſch
ta KUNGA Draudses nahkt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tu no Lehgera iſetj
prett tatweem Genaidneekeem/ tad
tew buhs ſargatees no iffuxras
faunas Leetas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad taiwa Starpa tahds
Wihrs irr/ kas neſchtihſts irr/
kad tam Nahti kas notizzis irr/
laid tas iſeet ahra preekſch Leh-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
